name: Rand Paul
subject: I plan to lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

When I heard the news on Saturday that
Justice Scalia had passed away, my heart went out to his family,
friends, and to our country. Justice Scalia was a great defender
of the constitution and an incredibly important conservative
voice in the court.

There is no doubt his voice of reason will be
missed on the bench.

And the vacancy will be felt in more ways
than one.

You see, President Obama and the Democrats
have wasted no time making this vacancy a huge political
statement, and they are calling for an immediate replacement in
the court - of course a liberal one that could tilt the balance
of the court for years.

President Obama thinks this is his chance to
put an end to originalist interpretation of the Constitution. His
last chance, in his last few months office.

I am not going to let him do it. There's too
much at stake.

Will you join with me today in standing up to
President Obama and the liberals in the Senate?

If you don't, it is clear what will happen.

President Obama will nominate a replacement
-- a liberal replacement -- and liberals in the Senate will force
the idea that it's the job in the Senate to confirm whoever the
President recommends.

This could change the entire path of our
country with just a few short months until our next President
takes office.

I cannot stress this enough: the Senate
should not confirm a Supreme Court nomination from President
Obama.

The fact of the matter is, it's been standard
practice over the last nearly 80 years that Supreme Court
nominees are not nominated and confirmed during a presidential
election year.

In fact, Democrats in the Senate held to that
standard during Republican Presidencies.

Now of course they are singing a different
tune.

I plan to lead the fight to stop them in the
Senate.

Patriot, will you stand with me as I do
everything I can to block President Obama's attempt to silence
the opinion of the American public?

The passing of Justice Scalia has made it
more clear than ever that the role of the Senate is vital to
maintaining liberty.

Without a strong Senate, we cannot ensure
that our court is upholding the Constitution.

That's why I am committed to another term for
Kentucky and for this country.

Please stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

GIVE $100 TODAY >>

Or donate another
amount >>

body:
Dear Friend,

This week South
Carolinians have a chance to help nominate a proven conservative
in 2016. Ted Cruz is the only consistent conservative running
that has a path to the nomination and to taking back the White
House. He's a conservative who can win and who has a record of
doing exactly what he says he will do. That's the difference
between Ted and other candidates - some have been deal makers
their entire lives, and still are eager to make deals with
Democrats. And others have been quick to cave to deals once the
Washington pressure starts.

When you look at all
the candidates' records on immigration, tax policy, marriage, and
life, the choice is clear - Ted Cruz is the only one with a
proven record of standing for principle. That's who he is, and
it's how he will govern so that we will enjoy a freer, safer, and
more prosperous America.

Best,

Rick Tyler

name: Ruth Sherlock
subject: A fitting question for Presidents' Day:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33560596:sVC02rCuN:m:1:876315805:D625E46211C02D75D9EC0AD6DB7F3E45:r)
---

Peter,

Today is Presidents' Day, and as we look forward to this election year, it's worth looking back.

From Washington to Lincoln to Reagan, America's greatest presidents were those who both embodied and strengthened our unique American creed of freedom, equality, and justice for all.

Now it's time to choose our next president, and whether that person has the right values, vision and dedication to the Constitution is up to us.

After two disastrous terms of Barack Obama, with a seat to fill on the U.S. Supreme Court, and in a world that grows more dangerous by the day, our choice is more important than ever.

I decided to join Dr. Carson's team and lead his campaign here in South Carolina because his values, integrity, humility and life experience make him uniquely qualified to lead our nation.

Right now, we're doing everything we can to make that case to the people of South Carolina, because they will make their voices heard in just 5 days. We've built a deep grassroots effort across the state and the enthusiasm is undeniable.

**[You can help by ensuring that we have the resources to share Dr. Carson's message with every voter. Please watch our current ad and then donate just $3 to keep it running.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33560596:sVC02rCuN:m:1:876315805:D625E46211C02D75D9EC0AD6DB7F3E45:r)**
**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33560596:sVC02rCuN:m:1:876315805:D625E46211C02D75D9EC0AD6DB7F3E45:r)
---
**
As a South Carolinian, I know how seriously people take this responsibility. They are looking for someone who respects both the power and limits of the office, who will represent and fight for their values and principles, and who will tell the truth and do what's right even when it's difficult.

That person is Dr. Ben Carson -- [and with your support before February 20th](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33560596:sVC02rCuN:m:1:876315805:D625E46211C02D75D9EC0AD6DB7F3E45:r), the people of South Carolina will get him one step closer to the Oval Office.

Sincerely,

Ruth Sherlock
South Carolina State Director
Ben Carson for President

| **McConnell throws down the gauntlet: No Scalia replacement under Obama**
\-- _Politico_ , 02/13/2016 Nobody wants to rush to politicize the passing of a public servant, but unfortunately Mitch McConnell couldn't help himself. In an unprecedented move, McConnell is already promising to obstruct the constitutional process and President Obama's next Supreme Court nominee. It is a complete -- and disgraceful -- abdication of his constitutional responsibility.

It has never been more clear that we need to win back the Senate so that Republicans like Mitch McConnell can't continue to play petty politics with the most important aspects of our democracy.

The fate of the Senate lies with this Florida race. We need to grab this momentum and use it to make sure we can win back the Senate and end this obstruction madness. That means 5,000 signatures in the next 24 hours. [**Will you step up?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22c4/738133e4/34d6c167/7f83d313/1987310624/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160215")

McConnell is choosing election year politicking over his constitutional duty. This is no surprise from a Republican Senate majority that has done almost nothing but obstruct for the last 2 years.

We have had enough of this kind of blatant political obstruction -- it's exactly what's wrong with Washington. It's moments like these that we are even more fired up about winning in Florida, turning the Senate blue and getting our government working again. But we're going to need your help. [**Will you stand with us to stop McConnell and his obstruction once and for all >>**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22c4/738133e4/34d6c167/7f83d313/1987310624/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160215")

It has never been more clear that we need to win back the Senate so that Republicans like Mitch McConnell can't continue to play petty politics with the most important aspects of our democracy. The fate of the Senate lies with this Florida race. We need to grab this momentum and use it to make sure we can win back the Senate and end this obstruction madness. That means 5,000 signatures in the next 24 hours. "" McConnell is choosing election year politicking over his constitutional duty. This is no surprise from a Republican Senate majority that has done almost nothing but obstruct for the last 2 years. We have had enough of this kind of blatant political obstruction -- it's exactly what's wrong with Washington. It's moments like these that we are even more fired up about winning in Florida, turning the Senate blue and getting our government working again. But we're going to need your help. "" Thank you for your support, Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

body:

---
| | | | Peter, One of my supporters asked me a question yesterday at a rally in South Carolina that got me thinking. He was thrilled -- just like we've been -- with the outpouring of support we've seen over the past few days in South Carolina. He asked me if I see my campaign just taking off from here. It's a good question -- and I feel good about where things are going, no doubt -- but I wanted to make a broader point. Our country is about more than just one election, or what political party's in control, and we all need a sense of perspective sometimes. This view is especially informed by my faith: The peace we talk about in Christianity isn't just about, say, the absence of violence or conflict. It's also about knowing that we have a higher purpose, that we're made for eternity, and have the gift of salvation. **[Here 's what I had to say:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/46227316:6Ft3kcrgN:m:1:1349778030:D97FA3D58A9165F54E241DD90A228B5D:r)**

name: Rob Portman
subject: A win in the fight against drug addiction
body:
| [](robportman.com/fight_drug_addiction) Peter -- Last week, we made progress in the fight against heroin. My legislation to combat the prescription drug and heroin addiction crisis passed out of committee unanimously and is one step closer to becoming law. On Friday, I joined Attorney General DeWine in Cincinnati at an event announcing Kroger's decision to provide an anti-overdose drug without a prescription.

Drug addiction is tearing families apart and devastating communities across Ohio. Too many are unable to achieve their God-given purpose because of this disease. There's still a lot of work left to do to help families, help communities, and help people get their lives back on track. We must continue to work to support families and communities that need us.

[](robportman.com/fight_drug_addiction)
I've met with those struggling with addiction all across our state, from Toledo, Lima and Marion to Columbus, Cincinnati, and Cleveland. At three Ohio hospitals I have seen the care they are giving babies born addicted to drugs because the grip of addiction is so strong that their mothers used during pregnancy. As a father, this is heartbreaking -- we must do more to help. I will continue to lead on this issue. I will continue to fight for those struggling with addiction because every Ohioan deserves a shot at a brighter future. There are very few people across our state that haven't been affected by this crisis. Join me in fighting back. All best,
Rob Portman [](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heroin_1&n=1)[](http://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=heroin_1&n=2)[

name: Eric Greitens
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
I hope you had a wonderful weekend. As I thought about the despicable nature of what happened last week, and the assault not just on me, but on hundreds of thousands of veterans, I was constantly reminded that this is a necessary fight. Missouri politics unfortunately already has a low bar. If you didn't see what occurred please watch [this phony video](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabald8omDaWKxN1B-2Bh1Zs7A4qity9qzBc-2Fuuh2vhFZfVmx5NyXxfxXXsGObjew73Lkdg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23z5geBH5JgTlMuQZSyYDHGFWbPwsvlYZ3pDXJU7HelUZjXZDq5m-2FZdIK4PRUE-2FKRMOpJ8W-2F9B3Pjy4Qj56rnYbCjwEhbRhgMWn8H88O8vGJ7Yp-2FPdLSXSAQVSRX3MfdIVpeYKEapKAQovLVqF9Q626nd5DMHlFGa6qrZYKfEvtDJlotOKIn9K-2Fvumj7hr4laXQWfYcYZC8eI30QCuUr3ss4BDxoAr75mDULDeGeshC2H-2FdaoXZhabtnfe0cZX8dHcCJrKeddY4lYlpcFEwXgyXEMCd5kNRhDDngWgncK-2BqmB7-2Br7jdURrC9dl8yswW1xv0e2-2Bn8e3cGhqXU4Th-2BiD6c-2FdtB-2BD5-2FE03kpSCcuprglLNuClNVRHfBK8EQEtMF22wEIbcANx3NuAj7yteMVbyx) that was being spread by the Missouri political establishment and some of our opponents.
But I am so proud of what has come from this. It crystalized the importance of taking our state back. It emphasized the need for normal, good, and decent people to participate in the process. These attacks only serve as even more of a motivator for us to succeed and triumph over people who lack any integrity. My team and I put together [this point by point video response](http://links.ericgreitens.com/wf/click?upn=gx1vmCW81pIdJ958zAabald8omDaWKxN1B-2Bh1Zs7A4omq2KZQyskmxy3jH0Xh8jTh4EssI3w4Qn3CQ9T4B4grg-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpTQr4gRWB75RyMpewKgV8Y5Dq8vmvQfgsXCODy83DGzIixqgKIfkFMfyexGSIjwGPY4BcT3MGRtpISZzi6ET23z5geBH5JgTlMuQZSyYDHGFWbPwsvlYZ3pDXJU7HelUZjXZDq5m-2FZdIK4PRUE-2FKRMOpJ8W-2F9B3Pjy4Qj56rnYbCjwEhbRhgMWn8H88O8vGJ7Yp-2FPdLSXSAQVSRX3MfdIVpeYKEapKAQovLVqF9Q626nd5DMHlFGa6qrZYKfEvtDJlotOKIn9K-2Fvumj7hr4laXSh-2BsmgOr5onvc22QOsgPzPjJALvwClh6uX4ZC5LPdnKaBrBujRqzA-2FsMx5CKqiiSTlfCGKY0PPvwnKcj6fE-2FXllUWQLb-2BPsUVadC1WMQ7g0nZ64zussdgXMKN-2BpvvjtGOsM9adnRpHoKUbVpr2mi3Cbphe-2B8KGqOw4aZVGM-2FiIT99m2va-2BAoYjMsQ4uJgQBl-2B2wM-2FBYsk7g7pZIHy6Cmyb). If you haven't watched and shared it, please do so today.
We are so grateful for veterans who know me, who served alongside me, who so quickly called to offer their assistance at crushing this stunt.
Many, many thanks to the thousands of you who have posted on my Facebook wall, Tweeted to me, or e-mailed and offered to double down on your support of this mission. I am so grateful for friends like you.
I wanted to leave you with a few quotes included in our video from fellow Navy SEALs:
"I know Eric Greitens' record.. and I can tell you the anonymous attacks on Eric Greitens are sick, false and cowardly
-- Rob O'Neill, Navy SEAL
The man who killed Osama Bin Laden
"I've known Eric for 16 years; I first met him when he was a student at BUD/S (the basic SEAL training), where I was the Master Chief of Command. I've mentored and trained thousands of SEALs, and Eric was among the very best. Eric graduated at the top of his class and went on to become an extraordinary SEAL officer and combat leader, one I'm proud to call my friend.
